message:
Alien enhancement: AD, e-graph, conformal prediction, performance opts

Phases 0-11 of the alien enhancement plan:

Performance (Phases 1-5):
- FxHashMap for O(1) interpreter variable lookup
- SmallVec<[Atom; 4]> / SmallVec<[VarId; 2]> for heap-free equation fields
- Cached canonical fingerprint via OnceLock<String>
- #[inline] on hot primitive eval functions
- Reference-based cache key building (CacheKeyInputRef) to eliminate clones

Reverse-mode AD (Phase 6):
- New fj-ad crate with tape-based VJP for all 6 primitives
- Forward pass with tape recording, backward pass with adjoint accumulation
- Handles fan-out (x*x) via additive cotangent accumulation
- Replaces finite-diff in dispatch (kept as fallback for composed transforms)

Property-based testing (Phase 7):
- Proptest strategies for core types (literals, atoms, values, shapes, etc.)
- Fingerprint/composition determinism properties
- Add/mul commutativity, reduce_sum identity properties
- Symbolic-vs-numerical gradient cross-validation

Conformal prediction (Phase 8):
- ConformalPredictor with distribution-free coverage guarantees
- Finite-sample corrected quantile thresholds
- CalibratedEstimate with conformal bounds
- Integration into dispatch via calibrated_posterior_abandoned

E-graph optimization (Phase 9):
- New fj-egraph crate using egg equality saturation
- FjLang covering all 6 primitives
- 9 algebraic rewrite rules (commutativity, identity, annihilation, etc.)
- Jaxpr ↔ e-graph round-trip with translation validation

Enhanced evidence ledger (Phase 10):
- LogDomainPosterior for numerically stable Bayesian inference
- log_sum_exp for overflow-safe computation
- CalibrationReport with Expected Calibration Error tracking
- EProcess for anytime-valid sequential hypothesis testing

Expanded conformance (Phase 11):
- Sin/Cos program specs and fixture programs
- 4 new fixture cases (grad_sin, grad_cos, adversarial large/small)

59 tests pass (up from 32). 2 new crates, 4 new deps. All clippy-clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
